title: AI Ticket Summarizer
problem: Engineers spent 2+ hours daily manually reading and summarizing support tickets, causing delays and cognitive overload.
solution: Built a serverless AI pipeline using Amazon Bedrock (Claude) to automatically summarize incoming tickets, extract action items, and route them to the correct team via Slack/Google Chat.
architecture: AWS Lambda → EventBridge → Amazon Bedrock (Claude) → DynamoDB → SNS → Slack/Google Chat
challenges: Ensuring PII is not sent to LLM
results: Saved 2+ hours per engineer per day
lessonsLearned: Prompt engineering is critical for consistent output
Caching LLM responses significantly reduces costs

title: WAR Intelligence Platform
problem: Manual AWS Well-Architected Reviews were time-consuming and inconsistent across different architects.
solution: Developed an automated platform that ingests AWS account data, runs WAR checks, and generates AI-powered architecture recommendations using Bedrock.
architecture: AWS Config → Lambda → Bedrock → S3 → CloudFront → React Dashboard
challenges: Aggregating data from multiple AWS accounts
results: Reduced WAR review time from 2 days to 2 hours
Standardized review process across all customers
lessonsLearned: Multi-account data aggregation requires careful IAM design

title: CloudTrail Monitoring Solution
problem: Security teams lacked real-time visibility into critical AWS API calls across multi-account environments.
solution: Built a centralized CloudTrail monitoring solution that detects suspicious activities, privilege escalations, and compliance violations in real-time.
architecture: CloudTrail → EventBridge → Lambda → SNS → Slack + Email Alerts
challenges: High volume of CloudTrail events requiring intelligent filtering
lessonsLearned: Event filtering at source is more efficient than post-processing

title: Google Chat Notification Platform
problem: Teams used email for AWS alerts causing delayed responses and alert fatigue.
solution: Built a serverless notification platform that routes AWS alarms and events to Google Chat spaces with rich formatted messages and actionable buttons.
architecture: CloudWatch Alarms → SNS → Lambda → Google Chat Webhook API
challenges: Message formatting for different alarm types
Rate limiting on Google Chat API
lessonsLearned: Rich card formatting dramatically improves alert actionability

title: Cloud Cost Optimization Initiative
problem: Enterprise customers had uncontrolled cloud spend with no visibility into waste.
solution: Implemented comprehensive FinOps practices including rightsizing, Reserved Instance planning, Savings Plans, and automated cost anomaly detection.
architecture: Cost Explorer API → Lambda → Cost Anomaly Detection → Reports → Slack Alerts
challenges: Balancing cost savings with performance requirements
results: Achieved significant cost reductions for enterprise customers
lessonsLearned: FinOps requires both technical and organizational change

title: AWS Landing Zone Design
problem: Enterprise customer needed a secure, scalable multi-account AWS foundation from scratch.
solution: Designed and implemented a multi-account Landing Zone using AWS Control Tower, Service Control Policies, and Terraform modules.
architecture: Control Tower → Organizations → SCPs → Terraform → Account Vending Machine
challenges: Balancing security controls with developer autonomy
results: Zero-touch account provisioning in under 15 minutes
lessonsLearned: Account structure decisions are very hard to change later — invest time upfront
